title: NFT volume plummets, California's overreach, FBI meddling, climate change & national security
description:
(0:00) Bestie intros + Burning Man debate

(4:16) NFT trading volume plummets

(10:20) California's new fast food wages bill, government creating bad incentives, how the free market response will further the labor issue

(40:15) Zuckerberg on Rogan, FBI interference with the Hunter Biden laptop story

(52:00) Balancing fighting climate change without harming the economy or national security, EU energy policy failure

(1:06:04) Besties reflect on Mikhail Gorbachev's passing

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including the plummeting NFT trading volume, California's new fast food wages bill, FBI interference in the Hunter Biden laptop story, and balancing climate change with national security. The hosts also discuss Zuckerberg's appearance on the Joe Rogan podcast and reflect on Mikhail Gorbachev's passing. The conversation touches on government overreach, free market responses, and the potential consequences of these issues.

takeaways.text: California's new fast food wages bill may create bad incentives
FBI interfered with the Hunter Biden laptop story
Climate change policies must balance economy and national security
Government overreach can lead to unintended consequences
Free market responses can mitigate labor issues
Zuckerberg admitted to FBI meddling in the 2020 election

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern over government overreach and the potential consequences of climate change policies. They also discuss the plummeting NFT trading volume and the FBI's interference in the Hunter Biden laptop story, which contributes to a cautious tone.

notable_moments.description: Discussion on government overreach and its consequences
Zuckerberg's admission of FBI meddling in the 2020 election
